title: A Smile as Bright as Fireworks

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the last day of our summer camp. Everything's been going
well, but there's something that's been on my mind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita is clearly keeping an eye on me. What reason could she have to
keep stealing glances my way?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?! What is it? If you need help with anything, just let me know!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, lemme guess, you want me to prepare the equipment for our next
training session, right? Leave it to me, I'll have it done in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without giving me a chance to reply, Kita dashes off towards our next
training spot.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I miss my chance to ask her about the staring, so we get back into our
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, Kita's running form has been impeccable. Seems like this
summer camp has worked wonders for her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Whew...
choice_data_list:
Nice job out there! That was some good
running!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um, nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, Kita and I decide to go check out a festival happening
nearby.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um... sorry. Before we go to the festival, could we... talk for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Man! Running here was so much fun! This summer camp went by in a
flash, didn't it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I was only able to improve this much because of you,
Trainer. No doubt about it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Of course, I bet there's a ton of things I still haven't learned yet...
choice_data_list:
You improved because you gave it your all,
Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I always thought it was amazing how you could solve any problem
with ease!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No matter what question I asked, or what worry I came to you with,
you'd help me through it. In my mind, you were like a superhero with
all the answers.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But... when I told my dad about you, he said...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: "Not all hard work sees the light of day."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: When I heard him say that, it reminded me of what Dia said.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All I did was utilize what I learned from my family and coach. This is what've they've been preparing me for, after all.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We've all been working towards one dream—that one day, I'll win a
G1 race. And I don't plan on letting their efforts go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is our family's dream. Everyone's been waiting for this day—and
for all the races still to come—since long before I was even born.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. It was the same for Dia.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's obvious, isn't it? At least, it should be. After all, it's not like
there's an audience watching your every move.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But... at some point, I forgot that simple truth. I got so absorbed in
how amazing you both were, that I forgot about the hard work you
put in to get there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I know you've been trying your hardest. And I know it's all
for my sake.
choice_data_list: I'm doing it because I want to.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...Right. That's why I wanted to return the favor—to pay you back for
your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's when Dad told me...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: "A song you sing for someone will always reach their heart."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...It's kind of funny. To be honest, I didn't really get what he meant at
the time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I knew that I wanted to show my appreciation. Instead of
only you supporting me, I wanted to support you as well.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I went all out in training so I could show you improvement, did
all I could to help you relax...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I thought real hard and tried a bunch of things... though none of them
went the way I'd hoped.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But, just now... I found it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I found what I was searching for. I figured out what I can do for you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I just... want you to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Just now, when I saw your smile, it made my heart skip a beat!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Obviously part of it is wanting to repay my debts, and I also want to
show my gratitude, but it's more than just that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What I really want, from the bottom of my heart, is for you to be the
happiest person in the world.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's how I can support you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita's honest and sincere words leave me a bit flustered. Still, I
respond to her feelings.
choice_data_list: Let's make each other happy, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita's brilliant smile glows as bright as a fireworks display. The two of
us want each other to be happy, and it doesn't get much better than
that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: All righty! Come on, this is a festival! Let's make some noise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita raises both hands into the air with a reenergized look on her
face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Egged on by the people around us, we end up getting on stage.
Meanwhile, the beat of the drums echoes throughout the venue,
filling it with festival cheer.
